title: 3 Lumber Stocks to Buy for Growth and Dividends
text: While lumber stocks not come to mind first for dividend investors, we believe that if chosen carefully, companies in the sector can provide strong current yield and dividend growth potential. The three examples highlighted here – WestRock, International Paper and Amcor – offer varying degrees of current yield and dividend growth potential.

title: Amcor's (AMCR) Q2 Earnings Match Estimates, Revenues Beat
text: Amcor's (AMCR) fiscal second-quarter 2022 earnings are in line with estimates. The company maintains its adjusted constant-currency earnings per share growth guidance at 7-11% for fiscal 2022.

title: Amcor plc (AMCR) CEO Ron Delia on Q2 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript

title: Amcor (AMCR) Matches Q2 Earnings Estimates
text: Amcor (AMCR) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 0% and 4.80%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2021. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
